positive.stdout:

cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_symptom(monkeypox,coughing)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    has_symptom(monkeypox,headache)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_symptom(monkeypox,fever)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_symptom(monkeypox,tiredness)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    has_symptom(monkeypox,muscle_pains)).

% SZS output end Saturation.

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,
